reviews.comment:
LINDO LUGAR, $3100 la Piesa para 2 personas, Direc Tv, Aire acondicionado, baño con ducha. Habia unos bichitos q tuvimos q sacar con una escoba. Pero fuera de eso. Lindo lugar.

(Translated by Google)
NICE PLACE, $3,100 per room for 2 people, Direc TV, air conditioning, bathroom with shower. There were a few bugs we had to sweep off with a broom. But other than that, it was a nice place.
